testCases.title: Verify that a nullable column accepts a NULL value
Verify that a column rejects a value exceeding its defined length or precision
Verify that inserting a duplicate value into a unique column is rejected
Verify that a NOT NULL column rejects a NULL value
Verify that a foreign key constraint prevents insertion of a non-existent parent reference
Verify that a computed/generated column value is calculated correctly on insert
Verify that an invalid data type value is rejected by the column
Verify that deleting a parent record cascades to related child records
Verify that no orphan records remain after a related record is deleted
Verify that a check constraint enforces valid value ranges
Verify that default column values are applied when a field is omitted on insert
Verify that a composite unique constraint prevents duplicate combinations of values
Verify that referential integrity is maintained when a parent record is updated
Verify that an insert operation persists all submitted field values correctly
Verify that an update operation modifies only the targeted fields
Verify that a delete operation removes only the intended record
Verify that a bulk insert operation persists all records correctly
Verify that updating a non-existent record returns no rows affected
Verify that a soft-deleted record is excluded from standard queries
Verify that an upsert operation inserts when the record does not exist and updates when it does
Verify that a transaction rolls back completely on mid-transaction failure
Verify that concurrent writes to the same record do not cause a deadlock
Verify that a nested transaction commits only when the outer transaction commits
Verify that a long-running transaction does not block other read operations
Verify that a deadlock is detected and one of the transactions is automatically rolled back
Verify that the transaction isolation level prevents dirty reads
Verify that a migration script runs cleanly on a fresh database
Verify that a migration script is idempotent when run more than once
Verify that a migration script fails gracefully and reports an error on schema conflict
Verify that a rollback migration correctly reverts schema changes
Verify that seed data is correctly populated after a migration
Verify that a migration does not run against an incompatible database version
Verify that the page layout adapts correctly across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Verify that all images load with descriptive alt text
Verify that text does not overflow or truncate unexpectedly at any breakpoint
Verify that dynamic content, such as long usernames, does not break the layout
Verify that the page renders correctly with browser zoom levels other than 100%
Verify that empty-state content displays appropriately when no data is available
Verify that submitting a form with an empty required field shows an inline error
Verify that a field enforces its maximum character length
Verify that a success confirmation is shown after a valid form submission
Verify that a field with an invalid format, such as email, displays a format-specific error
Verify that form field values persist after a failed submission
Verify that a multi-step form retains data when navigating between steps
Verify that pasting text into a restricted field strips disallowed characters
Verify that all navigation links route to the correct destination
Verify that the breadcrumb trail reflects the current page location
Verify that navigating to a non-existent route displays a 404 page
Verify that the browser back and forward buttons navigate correctly within the app
Verify that deep-linking to a specific page loads the correct state directly
Verify that the active navigation item is visually highlighted
Verify that a modal can be closed via the close button, overlay click, and Esc key
Verify that a loading indicator is shown during an async action
Verify that a tooltip appears on hover and dismisses on mouse-out
Verify that drag-and-drop reordering updates the underlying list order
Verify that infinite scroll loads additional content as the user reaches the bottom
Verify that keyboard shortcuts trigger their intended actions
Verify that the page renders consistently across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge
Verify that the page functions correctly on iOS Safari and Android Chrome
Verify that print stylesheets render the page correctly
Verify that the page displays correctly under a dark mode or OS-level theme preference
Verify that the page behaves correctly with browser extensions like ad blockers enabled
Verify that touch gestures such as swipe and pinch-zoom work correctly on touch-enabled devices
Verify that a valid request returns HTTP 200 with the expected payload
Verify that the response time stays within the agreed SLA
Verify that a resource creation request returns HTTP 201 with a Location header
Verify that a DELETE request returns HTTP 204 with an empty body
Verify that a PATCH request updates only the specified fields and returns HTTP 200
Verify that a HEAD request returns headers without a response body
Verify that the response schema matches the documented API contract
Verify that pagination metadata (total, page, limit) is accurate
Verify that an unexpected or extra field in the request body is ignored or rejected per contract
Verify that nested objects and arrays in the response are correctly typed
Verify that date/time fields are returned in a consistent timezone and format
Verify that null values are handled consistently across response fields
Verify that a request missing a required field is rejected with HTTP 400
Verify that query parameters correctly filter the returned results
Verify that an unsupported HTTP method on an endpoint returns HTTP 405
Verify that sorting parameters return results in the correct order
Verify that a malformed JSON request body is rejected with a clear error message
Verify that idempotency keys prevent duplicate processing of repeated requests
Verify that an expired or invalid token is rejected on a protected endpoint
Verify that CORS headers are configured correctly for allowed origins
Verify that a request without an authorization header is rejected with HTTP 401
Verify that rate limiting returns HTTP 429 once the request quota is exceeded
Verify that a token issued for one scope cannot access resources outside that scope
Verify that a refresh token successfully issues a new valid access token
Verify that a server error response does not leak a stack trace
Verify that error responses follow the standard error schema
Verify that a not-found resource returns HTTP 404 with a descriptive error message
Verify that validation errors list all failing fields in a single response
Verify that a request timeout returns an appropriate error rather than hanging indefinitely
Verify that error messages are localized based on the request's language header
Verify that a low-privilege user cannot access an admin-only endpoint
Verify that repeated failed login attempts are throttled
Verify that a user cannot access another user's resource by modifying an ID in the URL (IDOR)
Verify that privilege escalation via a modified JWT claim is rejected
Verify that a deactivated or deleted user account cannot authenticate
Verify that role changes take effect immediately without requiring re-login
Verify that a SQL injection payload submitted in an input field is safely rejected
Verify that an XSS payload submitted in an input field is sanitized in the output
Verify that a file upload rejects disallowed file types and oversized files
Verify that a command injection payload submitted in an input field is safely rejected
Verify that an XML external entity (XXE) payload in an XML upload is rejected
Verify that a server-side request forgery (SSRF) attempt via a URL input field is blocked
Verify that path traversal sequences in a file path parameter are rejected
Verify that application traffic is served exclusively over HTTPS
Verify that PII is masked in application logs
Verify that sensitive data at rest is encrypted
Verify that sensitive data is not exposed in URL query parameters
Verify that sensitive fields are excluded from API responses returned to unauthorized roles
Verify that backups of sensitive data are encrypted and access-controlled
Verify that a session token is invalidated after logout
Verify that a state-changing request without a valid CSRF token is rejected
Verify that a session expires after the configured inactivity timeout
Verify that concurrent sessions from multiple devices are handled per policy
Verify that a session identifier is regenerated after a successful login
Verify that 'remember me' tokens expire after their configured lifetime
Verify that debug/verbose error mode is disabled in production
Verify that required security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS) are present
Verify that default or sample credentials are disabled in production
Verify that server version and technology stack are not exposed in response headers
Verify that unused ports and services are not exposed to the public network
Verify that dependency vulnerabilities are flagged by an automated security scan
Verify that a new API version remains backward compatible with existing consumers
Verify that consumer-driven contract tests pass for all registered consumers
Verify that a breaking schema change is caught by contract tests before deployment
Verify that the service returns a fallback response when a downstream dependency is unavailable
Verify that the circuit breaker trips after the configured failure threshold
Verify that retries with exponential backoff occur on transient downstream failures
Verify that the circuit breaker transitions to half-open and recovers after the cooldown period
Verify that message queue consumers acknowledge messages only after successful processing
Verify that a poison message is moved to a dead-letter queue after repeated failures
Verify that duplicate event delivery does not create duplicate side effects
Verify that eventual consistency is achieved within the expected time window
Verify that out-of-order event delivery does not corrupt final state
Verify that a saga compensates correctly when a downstream step fails
Verify that idempotent event handlers produce the same result when replayed
Verify that data replicated across services converges after a network partition heals
Verify that the health check endpoint reflects a degraded dependency
Verify that logs include a correlation/trace ID for cross-service requests
Verify that metrics such as latency and error rate are emitted for each service endpoint
Verify that distributed traces span all services involved in a request
Verify that alerts trigger correctly when a service breaches its error-rate threshold
Verify that a rolling deployment causes zero downtime
Verify that the service scales horizontally under increased load
Verify that a canary release routes only the configured traffic percentage
Verify that a failed deployment triggers an automatic rollback
Verify that a blue-green deployment switch does not drop in-flight requests
Verify that service configuration changes can be applied without a full redeploy
Verify that response time stays within SLA at expected concurrent load
Verify that throughput meets the target requests-per-second under load
Verify that response time remains within SLA as concurrent users ramp up gradually
Verify that database query performance stays consistent under load
Verify that response time remains stable across a sustained soak test over several hours
Verify that the system recovers gracefully after traffic exceeds capacity
Verify that auto-scaling triggers correctly under sustained load
Verify that the system degrades gracefully rather than crashing beyond peak capacity
Verify that auto-scaling scales back down once load subsides
Verify that the system rejects excess requests gracefully, e.g. with HTTP 503, rather than timing out under extreme load
Verify that no memory leak occurs during sustained load
Verify that CPU utilization stays within the acceptable range under load
Verify that no file handle or connection pool exhaustion occurs during sustained load
Verify that disk I/O stays within acceptable limits under load
Verify that garbage collection pauses do not noticeably impact response times
Verify that network bandwidth usage stays within expected limits under load
Verify that all interactive elements are reachable and operable using only the keyboard
Verify that a visible focus indicator is present on every focusable control
Verify that keyboard focus order follows a logical reading sequence
Verify that keyboard focus is not trapped outside of an intentional modal context
Verify that skip-to-content links allow bypassing repetitive navigation
Verify that a form validation error is announced by a screen reader
Verify that every form field has an associated label
Verify that dynamic content updates are announced via ARIA live regions
Verify that meaningful images have descriptive alt text and decorative images are marked as such
Verify that custom interactive components expose correct ARIA roles and states
Verify that body text meets the WCAG AA color contrast minimum
Verify that content remains usable and readable when zoomed to 200%
Verify that the interface remains usable with animations and motion reduced per user preference
Verify that information is not conveyed by color alone
Verify that focus and hover states do not rely on color alone to indicate change
Verify that captions or transcripts are available for audio and video content
Verify that a deep link opens the correct in-app screen
Verify that push notifications are delivered and open the correct screen when tapped
Verify that biometric authentication (Face ID / fingerprint) unlocks the app correctly
Verify that in-app purchase flows complete and reflect the correct entitlement
Verify that app updates preserve existing user data and settings
Verify that in-progress form data survives an orientation change
Verify that the app resumes correctly from the background
Verify that the app handles an incoming call or notification interruption gracefully
Verify that the app respects device-level accessibility text size settings
Verify that the app handles low battery or power-saving mode without losing unsaved data
Verify that the app handles offline mode gracefully
Verify that pending API calls retry successfully once connectivity is restored
Verify that the app behaves correctly on a low-bandwidth or high-latency connection
Verify that switching between Wi-Fi and cellular mid-session does not interrupt the active flow
Verify that a request timeout on a mobile network surfaces a user-friendly error
Verify that the critical checkout flow still completes after an unrelated change
Verify that a previously fixed bug remains fixed
Verify that user authentication flows remain unaffected after a release
Verify that previously reported edge cases remain covered after a refactor
Verify that notification and email triggers still fire correctly after a release
Verify that a third-party integration still functions after a dependency upgrade
Verify that dependent modules remain unaffected by the change
Verify that scheduled or batch jobs continue to run correctly after a deployment
Verify that reporting and analytics data remains accurate after a change
Verify that data exports and imports remain compatible after a schema change
